title: God Is Not Dead
author: Ravi Zacharias
notes: Philosophical argument for God's existence responding to modern atheism

title: The Eternal Challenge
author: Abu Zakariya
notes: Addresses the divine origin of the Quran against naturalistic explanations

title: The Atheist Delusion
author: Hamza Andreas Tzortzis
notes: Dismantles atheistic arguments using Islamic theology and modern philosophy

title: Islam and Rationalism
author: Ibn Rushd (Averroes)
notes: Classical Islamic philosophical response to materialist and atheist worldview

title: Why There Is Something Rather Than Nothing
author: Nuh Ha Mim Keller
notes: Islamic perspective on the cosmological argument against atheism
